message:
chore(gitignore): add beads ephemeral patterns and nested target directories

Add patterns to ignore:
- **/target/: Nested target directories (e.g., crates/*/target/) for test artifacts
- .beads/last-touched: Timestamp file updated on each beads interaction
- .beads/.bv.lock: Lock file with PID for beads viewer

These files are ephemeral and machine-specific.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ legacy_glow/
 
 # Rust build artifacts
 /target
+**/target/
 
 # IDE
 .idea/
@@ -28,6 +29,10 @@ Thumbs.db
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Beads ephemeral files
+.beads/last-touched
+.beads/.bv.lock
 charmed_rust_illustration.png
 ._charmed_rust_illustration.png
